message.content:
Remove unused code from redux ducks based on this list. For each file, read it first, then remove ONLY the unused items listed.

## src/redux/ducks/additionalCard.ts
- Line 20: Remove unused `value`
- Lines 23-31: Remove unused REQUEST_NAME, SUCCESS_NAME, FAILED_NAME, SUCCESS_BIRTH_DATE, SUCCESS_LIMIT, REQUEST_ADDITIONAL_CARD, SUCCESS_ADDITIONAL_CARD, FAILED_ADDITIONAL_CARD, CLEAR_ADDITIONAL_CARD
- Lines 143-150: Remove unused parameters: name, callback, name, errorNameMessage, birthDate, limit, callback, errorMessage

## src/redux/ducks/addressCard.ts
- Lines 5-9: Remove unused POST_REQUEST, POST_SUCCESS, POST_FAILED, CLEAR, ADDRESS_RESERVED_SUCCESS
- Line 24: Remove unused `isChanged`
- Line 43: Remove unused `State` type
- Lines 98-102: Remove unused parameters

## src/redux/ducks/blockCard.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Line 33: Remove unused `data`
- Lines 89-95: Remove unused parameters

## src/redux/ducks/cardTracking.ts
- Line 40: Remove unused `TimelineType`
- Line 78: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/cashback.ts
- Line 33: Remove unused `data`
- Line 45: Remove unused `Transactions`

## src/redux/ducks/contents.ts
- Line 6: Remove unused `DispatchTypes`
- Lines 14-17: Remove unused CLEAR, SUCESS, FAILED, REQUEST
- Line 51: Remove unused `data`

## src/redux/ducks/createPassword.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Line 11: Remove unused `data`
- Line 57: Remove unused `data`
- Line 61: Remove unused `callback`

## src/redux/ducks/credencial.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Lines 62-63: Remove unused `lastFourNumbers`, `credencial`

## src/redux/ducks/customers/cards.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Line 11: Remove unused `data`
- Lines 82-83: Remove unused `callback`, `data`

## src/redux/ducks/customers/products.ts
- Lines 5-8: Remove unused REQUEST, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLEAR
- Lines 12-19: Remove unused XS, VA, VW, SFF, SSR, VX, XW, T
- Line 23: Remove unused WAITING_PAYMENT
- Line 26: Remove unused `data`
- Lines 179-180: Remove unused parameters

After making all changes, confirm what was removed.

content.text: I'll read each file and remove the unused code as specified. Let me start by reading all the files in parallel.
Now I'll make all the edits to remove the unused code from each file.

input.old_string:

  SUCCESS_BIRTH_DATE = '@additionalCard/success_birth_date',
  SUCCESS_LIMIT = '@additionalCard/success_limit',

  SUCCESS_ADDITIONAL_CARD = '@additionalCard/success',
  FAILED_ADDITIONAL_CARD = '@additionalCard/failed',
  CLEAR_ADDITIONAL_CARD = '@additionalCard/clear',
}
